message.content:
Google Gemini CLI에서 Gemini 3.1 Pro를 사용하는 방법을 검색해주세요. 특히:
1. gemini CLI에서 Gemini 3.1 Pro의 정확한 모델 ID (예: gemini-3.1-pro, gemini-3-pro 등)
2. /model 명령으로 설정하는 방법
3. 이 모델이 무료인지 유료인지 (API 키 필요 여부)

이 공식 블로그를 참고하세요: https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/ai-machine-learning/gemini-3-1-pro-on-gemini-cli-gemini-enterprise-and-vertex-ai

content.text: 공식 블로그와 관련 자료를 함께 검색하겠습니다.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Gemini 3.1 Pro and the Gemini CLI:

## Gemini 3.1 Pro Availability on Gemini CLI

Gemini 3.1 Pro is available in the Gemini CLI, along with other platforms. Developers and enterprises can access 3.1 Pro now in preview in the Gemini API via AI Studio, Antigravity, Vertex AI, Gemini Enterprise, Gemini CLI and Android Studio.

## Using the /model Command

The /model command lets you configure the model used by Gemini CLI, giving you more control over your results. You can run /model and select Auto (Gemini 3).

## Model ID Naming

Based on the search results, the model identifier appears to be `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`. If you are using gemini-3.1-pro-preview and the model ignores your custom tools in favor of bash commands, try the gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtools model instead.

Note: There appears to be a recent GitHub issue indicating that `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` wasn't yet listed in the models list as of February 19, 2026, suggesting this may be a newly released model that is still being rolled out to all users.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.content:
# Gemini 3.1 Pro on Gemini CLI - Key Information

## Model ID
The Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview model can be accessed using: `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`

## How to Use the /model Command
Launch Gemini CLI and enter the `/model` command, then select **Manual** to view available models. If you have access, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` will appear in the list.

You can also directly launch it via command line:
```
gemini -m gemini-3.1-pro-preview
```

## Cost Information
The documentation indicates that "Gemini 3 Pro and Gemini 3 Flash are available on Gemini CLI for all users," but it does not explicitly state whether these models are free or paid. The page mentions daily usage limits and fallback options when limits are reached, suggesting a freemium model structure, though specific pricing details are not provided in this content.

For current pricing, you would need to check the [Gemini CLI quota and pricing documentation](/docs/resources/quota-and-pricing/).

# Gemini CLI Model Selection Guide

## /model Command Usage

The `/model` command in Gemini CLI lets you configure which model processes your requests. Simply type `/model` to open a dialog with selection options.

## Available Model Options

**Auto settings (recommended):**
- **Auto (Gemini 3)**: System automatically selects the best Gemini 3 model for your task
- **Auto (Gemini 2.5)**: System automatically selects the best Gemini 2.5 model for your task

**Manual selection:** Choose a specific model from available options

## Model Selection Best Practices

The documentation recommends:

1. **Default to Auto** - Provides "a balance between speed and performance" for most users
2. **Use Pro for complex tasks** - When you need "the highest levels of reasoning and creativity"
3. **Use Flash for speed** - "If you need a simple response quickly"

## Important Notes

- The `/model` command doesn't override models used by sub-agents
- Gemini 3 access is limited to certain account types
- Enable preview features via the `settings` command to access Gemini 3 models
- Use the `--model` flag for startup configuration

# Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview: GitHub Issue Summary

## Issue Overview
A GitHub issue (#19532) was filed on February 19, 2026, requesting that `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` be added to the Gemini CLI's available models list.

## Current Status
The issue remains **open** and is labeled as **priority/p1** (important, near-term priority) and **maintainer only**.

## Key Details

**Problem:** The model wasn't appearing in the CLI's model selection list despite being announced as available.

**Evidence of Availability:** According to a Google Cloud blog post referenced in the comments, the model was promoted as accessible "via the Gemini API in Google AI Studio, Android Studio, Google Antigravity, and Gemini CLI."

## User Reports
Multiple comments indicate partial functionality:
- Some users successfully used `gemini -m gemini-3.1-pro-preview` with Vertex AI
- API key authentication and "Login with Google" reported failures
- Users received "model not found" errors in the CLI

## Status
As of the last update (February 20, 2026), the maintainers acknowledged they were actively working on integration, though the model hadn't yet been officially added to the public models list.

content.content:
# Gemini 3.1 Pro: Model Details

**Model ID:** `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`

**Pricing (per 1 million tokens):**
- Input: $2 (<200k tokens) / $4 (>200k tokens)
- Output: $12 (<200k tokens) / $18 (>200k tokens)

**Free Tier Status:** No free tier available in the Gemini API. However, you can "try Gemini 3 and 3.1 Pro for free in Google AI Studio."

**API Key Requirement:** An API key is required to use this model through the Gemini API.

**Context Window:** 1 million tokens input / 64k tokens output

**Knowledge Cutoff:** January 2025

# Gemini 3.1 Pro: Key Information

Based on the webpage content provided, here's what I found:

## Model Overview
The page announces **Gemini 3.1 Pro**, described as "a smarter model for your most complex tasks" where "a simple answer isn't enough."

## Publication Details
- **Published:** February 19, 2026
- **Last Modified:** February 19, 2026, 5:31 PM UTC
- **Author:** The Gemini Team

## Content Note
The webpage you've shared contains primarily HTML, CSS styling code, and metadata rather than detailed technical documentation about the model ID, CLI usage instructions, or pricing information.

**What's missing from this source:**

Would you like me to help you find that information from another source, or do you have additional documentation about Gemini 3.1 Pro you'd like me to analyze?

content.text:
수집된 정보를 정리하겠습니다.

---

## Gemini 3.1 Pro - Gemini CLI 사용 가이드

### 1. 정확한 모델 ID

```
gemini-3.1-pro-preview
```

공식 API 모델 식별자는 `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` 입니다. 2026-02-19 기준 프리뷰(preview) 단계입니다.

**주의**: GitHub 이슈 #19532에 따르면 아직 CLI 모델 목록에 완전히 통합되지 않아 일부 사용자는 "model not found" 오류를 경험 중입니다. 구글 maintainer들이 수정 작업 진행 중입니다.

---

### 2. /model 명령으로 설정하는 방법

**방법 A - CLI 내 /model 명령:**
```
/model
```
대화 중 입력하면 모델 선택 다이얼로그가 열립니다. "Manual" 선택 후 `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`를 고릅니다.
단, 현재 목록에 아직 안 나타날 수 있습니다.

**방법 B - 시작 시 플래그로 직접 지정 (현재 더 안정적):**
```bash
gemini -m gemini-3.1-pro-preview
```

**방법 C - Auto 모드 선택:**
```
/model  →  Auto (Gemini 3)  선택
```
시스템이 자동으로 적합한 Gemini 3.x 모델을 선택합니다.

---

### 3. 무료/유료 여부

| 경로 | 요금 | API 키 |
|------|------|--------|
| Gemini CLI (Google 계정 로그인) | **무료 (일일 사용 제한 있음)** | 불필요 |
| Google AI Studio | 무료 체험 가능 | 불필요 (로그인) |
| Gemini API (AI Studio API 키) | **유료** | 필요 |
| Vertex AI | **유료** | 필요 |

**Gemini API 가격 (gemini-3.1-pro-preview):**
- 입력: $2 / 백만 토큰 (200k 이하), $4 (200k 초과)
- 출력: $12 / 백만 토큰 (200k 이하), $18 (200k 초과)
- 컨텍스트 윈도우: 입력 100만 토큰 / 출력 64k 토큰
- 학습 데이터 컷오프: 2025년 1월

**결론**: Gemini CLI를 Google 계정으로 로그인하여 사용하면 무료이나 일일 한도 있음. Gemini API 키로 직접 호출 시 유료.

---

### 현재 상황 (2026-02-21 기준)

- 모델 공개 발표: 2026-02-19
- CLI 통합 상태: 부분 지원 (Vertex AI 경로는 작동, 일반 API 키/Google 로그인 오류 보고 있음)
- GitHub 이슈 [#19532](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/issues/19532) priority/p1로 처리 중

---

### 출처

- [Gemini 3.1 Pro - Gemini CLI 문서](https://geminicli.com/docs/get-started/gemini-3/)
- [/model 명령 문서 - Gemini CLI](https://geminicli.com/docs/cli/model/)
- [GitHub 이슈 #19532 - gemini-3.1-pro-preview 추가 요청](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/issues/19532)
- [Gemini 3 개발자 가이드 - Google AI for Developers](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/gemini-3)
- [Google Cloud 공식 블로그 - Gemini 3.1 Pro 발표](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/ai-machine-learning/gemini-3-1-pro-on-gemini-cli-gemini-enterprise-and-vertex-ai)
- [Google Blog - Gemini 3.1 Pro 발표](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-pro/)
- [9to5Google - Gemini 3.1 Pro 소개](https://9to5google.com/2026/02/19/google-announces-gemini-3-1-pro-for-complex-problem-solving/)
